expression: a B-independent lipid-facilitated bound-loading term (g_xy*C, g_ph*C) closes most of the long-chain shoot gap that free loading cannot => support; no improvement => refute
finding:
validation/longchain_mechanism.py: the B-independent lipid term (g_xy*C, g_ph*C; K_PL-gated) cuts long-chain straw+grain log10 RMSE 2.026 -> 0.428 (~100x -> ~2.7x; whole series 1.035 -> 0.386). PFDA straw 0.08->5.95 (obs 3.46), PFUnDA straw 0.16->11.15 (obs 8.16), PFOS straw 0.17->5.17 (obs 4.35).
